title: Danish PM fails to secure majority in party's weakest election showing since 1903
summary_full: The party, which has been in power since 2019, gained the most votes but faces tough talks on forming a new government.
summary_public: The party, which has been in power since 2019, gained the most votes but faces tough talks on forming a new government.
